title: Tenant Readiness Education Programs * AIDS/HIV - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Tenant Readiness Education Programs * AIDS/HIV 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CASCADE AIDS PROJECT CAP HOUSING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides case management to help individuals find housing and related resources. Services include short- and long-term housing search support and one-time emergency rental assistance for security deposits or eviction prevention. 520 NW Davis Street Suite 215 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Email (503) 223-5907 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT CAP HOUSING SERVICES
